title: MineCRACK
description: A collection of over 200 mods, adding a bunch of random stuff including a portal gun, space, guns, a new combat system, better end and nether, it just keeps going. Good if you like Minecraft but want something really new.
body:
**DO YOU LIKE MINECRAFT, BUT THINK IT'S JUST TOO NORMAL?**
**DO YOU WANT SOMETHING...**
**WEIRDER!?**

This modpack is a collection of over 200 mods, adding a bunch of random stuff including a portal gun, space, guns, a new combat system, better end and nether, aircraft, origins with classes (gives you special abilities), many more extra biomes, and improved structures, all while having performance improvements and various other nice QOL things.. Good if you like Minecraft but want something really new. Think of it as an everything bagel of minecraft mods.

So what are you waiting for? Download it, get some friends and see how you do in this cursed modpack.
